prompts.title: Soldier in Desert Patrol
prompts.prompt: A cinematic portrait of [Subject], a young man with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. He wears tactical desert military gear and kneels behind sand dunes, scanning the horizon with binoculars. Dust swirls in the dry air as the sun sets, casting dramatic shadows. Professional cinematic color grading emphasizes warm oranges and muted browns. Shot with 85mm lens at f/1.8 aperture, creating shallow depth of field and soft bokeh. High dynamic range, vertical 9:16 composition, mood is tense, vigilant, and immersive.
